data.name: Waifu Puzzle
data.detailed_description:
GAMEPLAY:



Waifu Puzzle is a captivating anime-style puzzle game featuring spicy illustrations of charming waifus. Complete numerous levels by assembling beautiful images, with two difficulty modes to choose from: Normal and Expert. Relaxing music, vibrant artwork, and a cozy visual style make every level an enjoyable experience.

FEATURES:



  • Anime-themed puzzle gameplay with spicy waifus
  • Unlock beautiful artwork as you progress
  • Two difficulty modes: Normal and Expert
  • Soothing music and stylish visuals
  • A wide variety of unique levels
  • Steam achievements to decorate your profile

data.short_description: Waifu Puzzle is a spicy anime puzzle game with tons of levels, relaxing vibes, and difficulty modes. Collect waifu art and enjoy chill, rewarding gameplay!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 保加利亞文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 匈牙利文, 越南文, 丹麥文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-2300
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 760 or Radeon HD 7850
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-7400 or AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 960 or Radeon R9 380X
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX
